card_description: The Kennedys is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick integrates his ETI theory, suggesting that humans are "escaped prisoners" from another star system (Albemuth) who are hiding on Earth behind a "veil" (Maya)."
